What is test doing right now?

record_types.name: Context

tagged_types.name: Result_Listener
tagged_types.code:
type Result_Listener is
  abstract new Ada.Finalization.Limited_Controlled with null record;

documentation.description:
Result_Listener is a listener for test results.
Whenever a test is run, the framework calls
registered listeners and tells them the result of the test.

access_types.name: Result_Listener_Class_Access
access_types.code: type Result_Listener_Class_Access is access all Result_Listener'Class;

subprograms.name: Add_Error
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Error (Listener : in out Result_Listener;
                     Info     :        Context)

documentation.description: Called after there is an error in the test.

subprograms.name: Add_Failure
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Failure (Listener : in out Result_Listener;
                       Info     :        Context)

subprograms.name: Add_Pass
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Pass (Listener : in out Result_Listener;
                    Info     :        Context)

subprograms.name: Add_Skipped
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Skipped (Listener : in out Result_Listener;
                       Info     :        Context)

documentation.description: Called when user wants to skip the test.

subprograms.name: End_Test
subprograms.code:
procedure End_Test (Listener : in out Result_Listener;
                    Info     :        Context)

documentation.description: Called after the test ends. Add_* procedures are called before this.

subprograms.name: Start_Test
subprograms.code:
procedure Start_Test (Listener : in out Result_Listener;
                      Info     :        Context)

documentation.description: Called before the test begins. This is called before Add_* procedures.
